articles.author: Nick Lichtenberg
articles.title: Trump’s strikes on Iran could cost American economy as much as $210 billion, top budget expert says - Fortune
articles.description: “One problem I have with cost-of-war calculations is that they really do ignore the counterfactual,” Kent Smetters of the Penn Wharton Budget Model told Fortune.
articles.content: As the United States enters day four of Operation Epic Furyits sweeping military campaign against Iran, launched in partnership with Israelthe financial toll on American taxpayers is beginning to com… [+4840 chars]
